name: Finam Trade Pro
description: Finam Trade API integration for trading, market data, account analytics, reports, and portfolio operations.

FINAM_SECRET.description: Permanent Finam API secret used to request temporary JWT sessions.

tools.name: finam_get_accounts
tools.description: List Finam trading accounts available to FINAM_SECRET

tools.name: finam_get_account_info
tools.description: Get Finam account equity, PnL, margin, cash, and positions

tools.name: finam_get_trades
tools.description: Get Finam account executed trade history

tools.name: finam_place_order
tools.description: Place a Finam market, limit, stop, stop-limit, or multi-leg order

tools.name: finam_place_sltp
tools.description: Place Finam stop-loss and take-profit orders

tools.name: finam_get_bars
tools.description: Get historical candle bars for a Finam instrument

tools.name: finam_get_latest_trades
tools.description: Get latest public trades for a Finam instrument

tools.name: finam_get_orderbook
tools.description: Get current Finam order book rows

tools.name: finam_get_asset_params
tools.description: Get account-specific Finam instrument trading parameters

tools.name: finam_get_exchanges
tools.description: Get Finam exchanges and MIC codes

tools.name: finam_get_constituents
tools.description: Get constituents for a Finam index

tools.name: finam_get_options_chain
tools.description: Get Finam options chain for an underlying
